methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 2 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 23 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 45.3x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Southern Launch is a growth-stage space and aerospace company founded by Lloyd Damp. The sector peer universe comprises 5 public companies (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private firms, including SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Blue Origin, Planet Labs, and Firefly Aerospace. However, the narrow peer set for Southern Launch's stage and tier yields insufficient datapoints for reliable comparison.

Two standard valuation methods proved inapplicable. Peer-median analysis failed because the private comp set, while spanning 23 total space and aerospace targets, contained zero same-stage peers, only two adjacent-stage companies, and no similar-valuation-tier matches—below the minimum three-datapoint threshold for defensible triangulation. Public-comp anchoring is similarly blocked: the Space & Aerospace sector median P/S ratio stands at 45.3x across the six public tickers listed, but Southern Launch's revenue is not on file, preventing application of this multiple.

Without disclosed revenue or a sufficiently dense peer cohort at comparable stage and scale, this analysis cannot produce a triangulated valuation range. A credible assessment would require either disclosure of target financials, identification of additional private-market transactions at similar scale, or explicit management guidance on revenue run-rate. The breadth of the sector peer universe does not offset the narrowness of genuinely comparable datapoints at Southern Launch's specific stage and capital tier.
